features: 4 SOCKET EXTENSION: Expands a single outlet into four, allowing you to connect multiple devices at once.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made with high-quality materials for reliable performance and long-lasting use.
1M EXTENSION LEAD: Compact length for convenient use in small spaces and to reduce cable clutter.
RECYCLED MATERIALS: Made from eco-friendly materials, promoting sustainability and reducing environmental impact.
CE CERTIFIED: Meets European safety standards, ensuring reliable and safe usage.
description: From the manufacturer Powering Everything You Need The extension cord range, designed to be powered up. From surge-protected cables to individually switched options, USB-equipped cords, and long extension cables, we offer a diverse selection to meet your every need. Our surge-protected cables provide peace of mind against power surges, safeguarding your valuable electronics at home, in the workplace, or in student dorms. Individually switched cables offer customizable power control, allowing you to easily manage multiple devices without unplugging them. With USB-equipped cords, charging your smartphones, tablets, and other USB-powered devices is a breeze, making them perfect for students juggling assignments and home office setups.
